name: Tortuga
description: Deals 200/400/800 damage and gives 1 second of Haste to ALL items on your board.
synergyNote: Board-wide haste makes every other item cycle faster — the Haste is often more valuable than the damage itself.

name: Pufferfish
description: Applies Poison each time it activates. Passively poisons your opponent every few seconds.
synergyNote: Core of Vanessa's Aquatic build. Pairs with Tortuga (for haste to cycle faster) and Scimitar of the Deep.

name: Flagship
description: Deals 50/100/200 damage with a 5-second cooldown at all tiers.
synergyNote: Was dormant for many seasons. Season 14 buff standardized CD to 5s across all tiers — now a viable A-tier carry.
season14Note: BUFFED: Cooldown reduced to 5s at all tiers (was 7/6/5). Damage significantly increased.

name: Anchor
description: Deals damage equal to 20% (silver) or 30% (gold/diamond) of the ENEMY's Max Health.
synergyNote: Scales with enemy health — exceptional against tanky Pyg or high-health boards. Fixed damage against glass-cannon builds.

name: Sniper Rifle
description: High-damage weapon with ammo. Slow cooldown but massive burst.
synergyNote: Pair with Silencer to reduce CD. The Spyglass extends range/damage further. Core of Mono-Weapon Sniper build.

name: Scimitar of the Deep
description: Aquatic weapon that deals damage and applies Poison.
synergyNote: Bridges the weapon and aquatic archetypes. Pairs with Pufferfish for stacking Poison.

name: ATM
description: Generates gold income and provides Shield on activation. An economic engine.
synergyNote: Always buy if offered on Day 1. Gold compounds — ATM income over a full run is worth far more than its sticker price.

name: Lemonade Stand
description: Grants +Max Health every time you sell a small item at a merchant.
synergyNote: Core of Max Health scaling Pyg. Sell small items at every opportunity. More Max Health = more Skyscraper damage = more survivability.

name: Skyscraper
description: Deals damage equal to 3× your total item value. Doubles total item value during combat.
synergyNote: The most value-dense late-game item in the game when fully built. Every item slot compounds Skyscraper's damage. Make every slot expensive.

name: Pyg's Gym
description: Grants buffs when you buy items from merchants. Stack with Rewards Card for compound value.
synergyNote: Buy actions throughout the run stack Pyg's Gym. Combine with Rewards Card — every buy improves both.

name: The Core
description: When an item to the LEFT activates, The Core fires — dealing damage AND charging all items to the right by 1 second.
synergyNote: Place fast-activating items to the left to constantly charge the chain. Radiant enchantment is essential to prevent Freeze counter.

name: Companion Core
description: Hastens adjacent items. Charges when Friend items activate. Powers the Dooltron build.
synergyNote: Core of the Dooltron/Bug Squad builds. Place Friend items throughout the board — each Friend activation charges the Companion Core.

name: Weaponized Core
description: Deals damage and permanently increases the damage of all weapon items to its right.
synergyNote: Permanent buffs compound over a long fight. Pair with high-quality weapons to the right for exponential late-game scaling.

name: Ignition Core
description: Applies Burn and enhances Burn-based items to its right.
synergyNote: Good early game (Burn is strong vs low HP), but falls off late game as enemies stack Shield. Below-average tier in Season 14.

name: Chris Army Knife
description: A small item that counts as a Friend, a Tool, AND a Tech item simultaneously.
synergyNote: Incredibly slot-efficient. Counts toward all three category-based synergies at once. Essential in most Dooley builds.

name: Robotic Factory
description: Gives ALL Friend items on your board +1 Multicast.
synergyNote: Transforms the Bug Squad build — every bug Friend fires twice. With Companion Core, each activation triggers the Core twice. Exponential scaling.

name: Dooltron
description: Fast clock Friend that generates Shield while dealing damage. Powers the Dooltron build with Companion Core.
synergyNote: The heart of the Dooltron build. Companion Core hastens it; it activates quickly and feeds back into the Core trigger loop.

name: Poppy Field
description: Deals damage and applies significant Poison. Considered potentially the best build anchor in the entire game.
synergyNote: The S-tier Mak combo: Poppy Field + Spider Mace + Floor Spike. Together they create a Poison machine with absurd late-game ceiling.

name: Spider Mace
description: Applies Poison on activation. Pairs with Floor Spike and Poppy Field for stacking Poison.
synergyNote: Part of the Poppy Field trinity. Each of these three items applies Poison, creating rapidly stacking Poison damage.

name: Floor Spike
description: Small item that applies Poison. Slot-efficient Poison stacker.
synergyNote: The small slot in the Poppy Field trinity. Applies Poison from a 1-slot item, freeing space for other synergies.

name: Philosopher's Stone
description: Gains +1-4 Regen permanently each time you transform a Reagent during the run. Provides base Regen that scales all run.
synergyNote: Transform reagents from Day 1 onward. By mid-run, Philosopher's Stone provides massive passive Regen, making Mak nearly unkillable.

name: Retort
description: Gains +4-7 Poison permanently each time you transform a Reagent. Stacks all run.
synergyNote: Transform reagents constantly — Retort's Poison value grows every time. By Day 10, Retort's passive Poison alone can be lethal.

name: Staff of the Moose
description: Deals 200 damage and applies Regen. Scales damage based on HP thresholds crossed during the fight.
synergyNote: Damage scales as your HP drops — rewards staying alive but not at full health. Pairs with self-poison for controlled HP manipulation.

name: Peacewrought
description: Economy item that generates gold and provides buffs. The backbone of Mak's A+ Peacewrought build.
synergyNote: Supports Library-style play — use gold to buy more reagents, transform more reagents, permanently stack Philosopher's Stone/Retort/Calcinator.

name: Skyliner
description: Deals damage and Burn every 10 seconds. Gains +1 Multicast for every flying item on your board.
synergyNote: Stack flying items aggressively — each one adds another Multicast. With 5 flying items, Skyliner fires 6x per activation. The most consistent Stelle build.

name: LavaRoller
description: Applies Burn with self-doubling capabilities. Considered the highest Burn ceiling in the entire game.
synergyNote: Can double its own Burn output — a fully-cycled LavaRoller produces Burn values that scale beyond any other item in the game.

name: Stellear Swallowtail
description: Charges when any item on your board gains Haste. Bridges haste-generation and cycle-speed.
synergyNote: Every Haste effect (Turbo enchantment, Tortuga, Microwave) charges this. Stack haste sources for near-permanent free charges.

name: Pill Buggy
description: Gains Shield whenever any item gets Haste.
synergyNote: In haste-heavy Stelle builds, Pill Buggy generates constant free Shield. Makes Stelle surprisingly tanky while running aggressive flying builds.

name: Balloon Engine
description: Triggers Burn effects on start and stop flying. Exploits the fly-cycling loop.
synergyNote: Every start-stop cycle fires twice. In a cycling board, Balloon Engine can apply Burn multiple times per second.

name: Hangar
description: Grants +10 Damage and +10 Shield to ALL items on the board, regardless of whether they are flying.
synergyNote: A passive board-wide buff for all items. Even in non-flying builds, Hangar provides free stats to every item.
season14Note: BUFFED: Now grants base +10 Damage and +10 Shield to all items regardless of flight status.

name: Durian
description: Converts your current Shield amount into Damage when activated.
synergyNote: The core of Jules' S-tier build. Stack Shield via Dragonmelon and shield items, then Durian converts it all into burst damage. Can be set up from Level 3.

name: Bread Knife
description: Converts Regen into Damage. Also stacks Max Health. Enables the Farmer's Market regen-to-damage build.
synergyNote: Stack Regen items, then Bread Knife converts that Regen into raw damage. Also passively increases Max Health — survivability while dealing damage.

name: Microwave
description: Low cooldown. Gives Haste to all Food items on the board.
synergyNote: The engine of every Jules build. Pair with many Food items — Microwave cycles the entire food board faster. Also triggers Stelle's haste-based items if somehow combined.

name: Feast
description: Deals large damage AND heals you. Has achieved 10-0 recorded runs as the primary win condition.
synergyNote: The rare item that does everything — damage and healing. Synergizes with any build that needs both offense and sustain.

name: Grill
description: Applies significant Burn. Pairs with Microwave for rapid cycling.
synergyNote: Core of the Burn Jules build (Anyone Can Cook). Microwave hastens Grill, which applies massive Burn faster and faster.

name: Birthday Cake
description: Grants 30% Crit Chance to your board.
synergyNote: Buffed in Season 14 to 30% — now a legitimate pick. Crit doubles ALL effects simultaneously including Burn, Poison, Shield, and Heal.

name: Runic Claymore
description: Deals damage equal to 15% of your own Max Health per activation.
synergyNote: S-tier since Season 14 buff. Stack Max Health via skills and items. Flexible — works in almost any Karnok build. The safest win condition.
season14Note: BUFFED: Damage increased from 10% to 15% of own Max Health.

name: Leather Jacket
description: Provides near-invulnerability during Enrage. Core of the Jacket Exodia S-tier build.
synergyNote: During Enrage, Leather Jacket makes you effectively unkillable. Pair with items that extend Enrage duration and maintain the Enrage window.

name: Hunting Knife
description: Fast-activating small weapon. Mandatory pickup every Karnok run.
synergyNote: Buy this immediately. Generates Rage from every activation, powers the Enrage cycle, and pairs with Hunter's Journal.

name: Hunter's Journal
description: Buffs weapon items. Mandatory support piece for every Karnok run.
synergyNote: The mandatory companion to Hunting Knife. Every weapon on your board gets better. Never skip this.

name: Wolf Mask
description: Generates Rage directly. Part of the mask trio.
synergyNote: SECRET INTERACTION: Sled + any mask in stash = instant 100 Rage, even without the mask on your board.

name: Giant Sling
description: Deals burst damage during Enrage windows.
synergyNote: Core of the Rage Burst and Giant Sling A-tier builds. Time your Enrage trigger to coincide with Giant Sling's ready state for maximum burst.

name: Karst
description: Shield-scaling pivot. Provides survivability while building Enrage windows.
synergyNote: The B-tier pivot point for defensive Karnok builds. Shield buys time to generate Rage safely.

name: Championship Belt
description: Deals damage equal to 5% of your own Max Health to adjacent items.
synergyNote: New Season 14 neutral item. Max Health scaling in a small slot — exceptional value for any Max Health build.

name: Foundation Robe
description: New Season 14 neutral item. Provides Shield and board buffs.
synergyNote: Being evaluated by the community — early results suggest strong synergy with Shield-scaling builds (Jules/Durian, Pyg).

name: Infernal Catapult
description: New Season 14 neutral item. Large damage-dealing weapon with Burn application.
synergyNote: Available to all heroes. Potentially strong in Burn-building strategies for non-Burn heroes.

name: Tracer Pistol
description: New Season 14 neutral weapon. Marks targets for enhanced follow-up damage.
synergyNote: New mechanic introduced in Season 14. Community still exploring full interaction potential.

name: Matchbox
description: Applies Burn on activation. Small slot Burn applier for Pyg.
synergyNote: Early Burn damage while building the economy. Helps Pyg win early fights he would otherwise lose.

name: Boomerang
description: Medium weapon that deals damage. Reliable early game for Pyg.
synergyNote: Pyg's best early damage item. Provides consistent damage output while building toward late-game scaling.

name: Duct Tape
description: Charges by 1 second when the item to its LEFT is used.
synergyNote: Place a fast-cycling item (like Uzi, 3s CD) to the left. Every 3 seconds, Duct Tape fires for free. Exceptional slot efficiency.

name: Arc Blaster
description: Tech item that charges Dooley's Core quickly.
synergyNote: Placed to the left of the Core, Arc Blaster rapidly advances the Core's cooldown. Essential for early-game chain setup.

name: Amber
description: Applies Slow to 1/2/3 items for 3 seconds. Also functions as a Reagent.
synergyNote: Dual use: Slow control + Reagent for transformation. Toxic enchantment doubles its Poison value when transformed.

name: Plague Glaive
description: Poison-scaling weapon with Multicast. Gains additional Poison with each activation.
synergyNote: Stacks its own Poison permanently during a fight. Combined with Retort's passive Poison, late-game Plague Glaive hits are devastating.

name: Metronome
description: Applies Haste to all items on the board simultaneously.
synergyNote: Board-wide Haste for Dooley — every item cycles faster including the Core. In Stelle builds it triggers all haste-based effects simultaneously.

name: Isochoric Freezer
description: Freezes enemy items. Disruption tool for controlling opponent combos.
synergyNote: Place in a Dooley board to counter other chain-reaction builds. Freezing the opponent's Core or engine item breaks their combo entirely.

name: Rewards Card
description: Generates value and gold on buy and sell actions. Pairs with Pyg's Gym for compound economy.
synergyNote: Stack Rewards Cards if possible. Every buy and sell action compounds. The Pyg's Gym + Rewards Card combo generates enormous value over a full run.

name: Calcinator
description: Gains +4-7 Burn permanently each time you transform a Reagent. Stacks all run.
synergyNote: Transform reagents from Day 1 to maximize Calcinator's burn stacks. By late-game, passive Calcinator burn is a secondary win condition.

name: Dragonmelon
description: Passively grants Shield equal to 15-20% of your Max Health. Elevated to Gold tier in Season 14.
synergyNote: Core of Durian Shield Conversion. Higher Max Health = higher Shield from Dragonmelon = more Durian damage. Stack Max Health for exponential scaling.
season14Note: NERFED: Elevated to Gold tier (was Silver). Shield cap reduced to 25%.

name: Magic Carpet
description: Scales damage on critical hits. Each crit increases its permanent damage.
synergyNote: Pair with Deadly enchantment (50% crit chance) on adjacent items. Each crit permanently increases Magic Carpet's damage — snowball item.

name: Rapid Injection System
description: Self-poisons your player while also granting Regen and Lifesteal. The Regen counters the self-poison.
synergyNote: Core of Mak's Self-Poison build. The self-applied Poison is countered by the Regen — net result is free Lifesteal and poison synergy items proc constantly.

name: Potion Distillery
description: Enhances all Potions in your board. Note: as of Season 14, no longer generates potions from other heroes' items.
synergyNote: Stack potions and let Distillery make all of them hit harder. Build around high-quality Potions for maximum value.
season14Note: CHANGED: No longer generates potions from other heroes' items.
